name: Herbed Turkey and Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, bring broth, butter and salt to a boil. Add herbs; set aside.
2. Toast bread; cut into 1/2-inch cubes. Place in a bowl.
3. In a skillet, brown sausage; remove with slotted spoon and add to bread.
4. Add butter to drippings; sauté celery, carrots, mushrooms, ham and onions for 15 minutes.
5. Add to bread mixture; stir in the next eight ingredients.
6. Add eggs and 3/4 cup basting sauce; mix lightly.
7. Stuff turkey with about 8 cups dressing. Skewer openings; tie drumsticks together.
8. Place on rack in roasting pan. Baste with some of the remaining basting sauce.
9. Bake, uncovered at 325 degrees for 5 to 5-1/2 hours or until thermometer reads 185 degrees, basting every 30 minutes.
10. When turkey begins to brown, cover lightly with foil.
11. Add broth to remaining dressing; mix lightly.
12. Place in a greased 2-1/2 qt baking dish; chill.
13. Cover and bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour; uncover and bake 10 min.
